violations.description: Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towels were not available at the handwashing sink. Paper towels should be available at all times.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Wood studs/legs under prep table have not been sealed. These should be sealed so they are smooth and nonabsorbent.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Food employee has long hair that was not restrained during inspection. Long hair should be properly restrained.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single use items were found on the floor of the storage area. Single use items should be kept off of the floor.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Wood studs/legs under prep table have not been sealed. These should be sealed so they are smooth and nonabsorbent.
